pf2e-skill-issue.note-placeholder: Text field to keep additional information

roguelike.name: Roguelike Mode
roguelike.hint: Treat every class as if they were a rogue - grants a skill increase at every level.

plan-ahead.name: Plot the Future
plan-ahead.hint: Allows preplanning all allocations up to level 20 in advance. They won't take effect until you reach the required level.

unlimited.name: Unlimited Choice
unlimited.hint: Disables allocation cap on every level. It's up to the user to keep track of them.
